title: The Least Important Farmer on the Block
thesisOneSentence: The fastest way to grow more food for the neighborhood was to stop trying to grow more of it ourselves and to teach the neighbors instead.
styleSignatureLine: They said, the fastest way we ever found to grow more food was to stop trying to grow more of it ourselves. (reversal signature for the Counter Intuitive engine)
forbiddenWordForStyle: paradox (must never appear in a Counter Intuitive episode; verified absent)

arcBeats.beat: the mistake that became the turn

transparencyBeatPlacement: Woven into the honest-cost beat where the guest names the pride they had to surrender; never the raw consent language.
finalLine: Go find the roof you have been guarding, and teach someone else how to climb it.
